summary: Iteration 3 focused on verifying user-requested changes: BOQ toggles, receiving-card removal, editable BOQ, sales-rep + partner selection on Configurator, customer/partner aggregates + drill-down drawers, and clickable Dashboard KPIs. Backend: 12/12 pytest cases pass. Frontend: all critical UI flows verified end-to-end via Playwright (Dashboard KPI navigation, Configurator BOQ, live recompute, sales-rep-disabled-for-executive, customer & partner drawers with linked-quote navigation).

issues: Partners table has 5 configured columns + 2 aggregate columns (Quotes, Value). On smaller viewports/columns can overflow horizontally without a scroll indicator. Not a bug, cosmetic only.

verified_endpoints: POST /api/configure with include+spare_percent — receiving_card removed from default items
POST /api/configure with include toggles for mcb/ups/video_processor/etc — items list changes accordingly
POST /api/configure spare_percent=5 -> Spare Modules qty = ceil(total_cabinets*5/100)
GET /api/auth/users as admin -> returns super_admin + sales_manager + sales_executive
GET /api/customers/{id}/quotes -> filtered list, count matches aggregate
POST /api/quotes with sales_person_id_override as admin -> quote.sales_person_id/name reflect override
POST /api/quotes with sales_person_id_override as sales_executive -> override IGNORED, uses exec's own id
verified_ui_flows: Dashboard KPI cards (kpi-quotations/customers/partners/sales/area/pitch) wrapped in <Link>; hrefs = /quotes, /customers, /partners, /reports, /quotes, /products respectively

Configurator @ 4m x 2.25m: BOQ shows 8 default items (cabinet, controller, video_processor, mounting_frame, installation, power_signal_cabling, packing_transport, spare_modules). No 'Receiving Card'. MCB & UPS available via toggle (off by default)

Include toggles include-cabinet, include-controller, include-video_processor, include-mounting_frame, include-installation, include-power_signal_cabling, include-packing_transport, include-spare_modules, include-mcb, include-ups all present
Spare % input (spare-percent-input) present and functional; recompute reflects new qty

Editable BOQ: item-qty-0 edited (999) -> grand-total updated live (₹24,83,310 -> ₹10,87,63,550). gst-percent-input set to 28 -> grand-total updated. item-remove-0 removes row. add-item-btn appends custom row
quote-partner-select present with 'Direct (no partner)' + partner list
quote-rep-select for admin (super_admin): not disabled. For sales_executive: element has data-disabled attribute set (shadcn Select disabled) -> confirmed disabled per role

Customers page: 4 rows loaded, columns include Quotes count + Value. Clicking IIT Bombay row opens customer-detail-drawer showing 3 KPI cards (Quotations=2, Total Value=₹40,85,160, Won=0) and 2 linked quotes (LOGIC/Q/2026/0003 test, LOGIC/Q/2026/0001 T1 Smoke). Clicking linked-quote-{id} navigates to /quotes/{id}
Partners page: 3 rows loaded, partner-detail-drawer opens on row click (NorthStar AV shows 0 quotes/₹0 as expected)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py list_customers/list_partners builds aggregates in-memory (fetches all quotes and defaultdict counter). Acceptable for current scale (<5000 quotes) but should be pushed into a MongoDB aggregation pipeline ($group) if volume grows.

Configurator.jsx line 122: `if (user) setSalesRepId(user.id);` is called inside the /auth/users .then() — this races with the useEffect dep [user] and can reset a manually chosen rep back to the current user whenever /auth/users refires. Consider guarding with `if (!salesRepId) setSalesRepId(user.id)`.

Configurator.jsx addCustomItem line 165 uses key='custom' for every added row — backend accepts it (models.py QuoteItem.key is Optional) but multiple 'custom' keys duplicated across rows could confuse future reporting. Consider auto-suffixing (custom-1, custom-2).

Directories.jsx CrudTable renders a single component for both Customers and Partners, so the aggregate columns (Quotes / Value) are appended after the resource-specific columns. Partners table now has 5+2 columns which can overflow horizontally without scroll indicator on narrow viewports (cosmetic only).

server.py line 306 `d.pop('sales_person_id_override', None)` is defensive but body.model_dump() has already included it into `d`, so it is popped anyway before insert — good. However, the schema QuoteCreate still declares sales_person_id_override, so the stored quote document will not contain this field after pop — verify by GET /quotes/{id} (it is stripped). ✅
test_credentials: admin@logic.com/admin123 (super_admin), exec@logic.com/exec123 (sales_executive) — both used and confirmed working
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seed data (8 products, 4 customers, 3 partners). Test-created quotes with prefix 'TEST_ITER3_' are cleaned up in test teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter-3 user-requested changes verified. Existing test quotes remain in DB (LOGIC/Q/2026/0001..0003) which is fine — expected per problem statement. AI budget issue from iteration_1 (POST /api/ai/recommend returning 402 due to EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget) is still open but out of scope.
